pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to version 4.0.1 to align with Java 21 support.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21.
Update the Maven wrapper version property to 3.3.4.
Update the JaCoCo version property to 0.8.14.
Add a new property for the Sonar version.
Remove the default activation of the coverage profile.
Configure JaCoCo to output reports in XML format.

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Restrict pull_request triggers to specific event types to reduce unnecessary workflow runs.
.github/workflows/analysis.yml.human_impl: branches: [main, beta, alpha] -> types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CI environment to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to match the target runtime.
Inject GITHUB_TOKEN into the Sonar step to enable PR decoration and security hotspot features.
Use the full plugin coordinate for sonar:sonar to ensure correct execution in the CI environment.
.github/workflows/analysis.yml.human_impl: mvn clean verify sonar:sonar -> mvn -B clean verify org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar

.github/workflows/analysis.yml.general_idea: Activate the coverage Maven profile during the build to provide code coverage data to Sonar.

.github/workflows/release.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the release job.
Remove the npm cache configuration from the setup-node step in the release workflow.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.4 to align with newer build tooling standards.
Update the Maven distribution URL to point to version 3.9.12.
Configure the wrapper to download only the script distribution type.

.releaserc.general_idea: Corrected invalid JSON syntax by changing string 'true' to boolean true for the prerelease property.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script version from 3.2.0 to 3.3.2 to align with the project's dependency updates.
Refactor shell script syntax for better readability and POSIX compliance, including case statement formatting and whitespace handling.
mvnw.human_impl: Reformatted `case` statements and `if` conditions to use standard indentation and spacing (e.g., `CYGWIN* | MINGW*)` instead of `(CYGWIN*|MINGW*)`).

mvnw.general_idea: Fix potential issues with character hashing in the `hash_string` function by explicitly extracting characters.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed `hash_string` to use `char="${str%"${str#?}"}"` before hashing, ensuring correct character code retrieval.

mvnw.general_idea: Add a `trim` function to handle whitespace and newline characters in property values, addressing issues in exotic environments like MinGW.
mvnw.human_impl: Added `trim()` function using `tr -d '[:space:]'` and applied it to `distributionUrl` and `distributionSha256Sum` parsing.

mvnw.general_idea: Allow customization of the Maven user home directory via the `MAVEN_USER_HOME` environment variable.
mvnw.human_impl: Introduced `MAVEN_USER_HOME="${MAVEN_USER_HOME:-${HOME}/.m2}"` and used it to construct `MAVEN_HOME`.

mvnw.general_idea: Improve error handling for download failures by adding explicit error checks for `wget` and `curl` commands.
mvnw.human_impl: Appended `|| die "wget: Failed to fetch $distributionUrl"` and similar for `curl` to their respective download commands.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated `new java.net.URL(String)` constructor with `java.net.URI.create(String).toURL()` in the embedded Java downloader.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed `new java.net.URL( args[0] )` to `java.net.URI.create( args[0] ).toURL()` in `Downloader.java`.

renovate.json.general_idea: Add dependency dashboard to visualize and manage pending updates.
Configure Renovate to use semantic commit messages for PRs.
Remove hourly PR limits and increase concurrent PR limit to 10.
Pin GitHub Action digests to ensure reproducible builds.
Set the timezone for schedule calculations to America/New_York.
Restrict dependency updates to weekdays between 9am and 6pm.
Automatically label dependency PRs with 'dependencies'.
Enable platform-level automerge with squash strategy.
Configure Renovate to rebase PRs when behind the base branch.
Customize the title of the dependency dashboard.
Auto-merge patch and minor updates for Maven dependencies.
Auto-merge patch and minor updates for GitHub Actions.
Explicitly disable automerge for major version updates.
Group Spring Boot and Spring Framework dependencies into a single PR.
Group testing libraries (JUnit, Mockito, AssertJ, Testcontainers) into a single PR.
Explicitly enable the Maven manager in Renovate.
Explicitly enable the GitHub Actions manager in Renovate.
Ignore the target directory to avoid scanning build artifacts.
Create PRs only when not pending other updates.
Require the 'build' status check to pass before merging.
